ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed on the stock exchange */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (consolidated or standalone) */,
  "year_ending" TEXT /* Year the financial statement ends */,
  "debt_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the company */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue reported by the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income reported by the company */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "auditor_firm" TEXT /* Name of the auditing firm */,
  "audit_opinion" TEXT /* Audit opinion of the financial statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the stock */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who made the comment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_comments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_comments_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who gave the rating */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
